title: Yijing Hexagram 23: Bo (Splitting Apart)
description: Hexagram 23 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 23 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Splitting Apart. It does not further one to go anywhere. The mountain rests on the earth.
